mappings.content: plan how to build a simulator of horse farm. player can buy and extend stables, buy new types of horses, feed and wash horses. there is a track and field area for horses - player can train horses there - they jump over obstacles like wooden planks and small water puddles etc. once horse is trained player can ride for time and get points for good race. horses are different in color and are fully animated. graphics is cartoon wih disney style.
